visualizerParams.title: Apparent Power Calculation
visualizerParams.description: Calculate the apparent power in a single-phase AC circuit using complex numbers.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
import cmath, math

def get_apparent_power(v, i, v_ang, i_ang):
    v_rad = math.radians(v_ang)
    i_rad = math.radians(i_ang)
    v_rect = cmath.rect(v, v_rad)
    i_rect = cmath.rect(i, i_rad)
    return v_rect * i_rect

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"Power: {get_apparent_power(100, 5, 0, 0)}")
visualizerParams.finalCode:
import cmath, math

def get_apparent_power(v, i, v_ang, i_ang):
    v_rad = math.radians(v_ang)
    i_rad = math.radians(i_ang)
    v_rect = cmath.rect(v, v_rad)
    i_rect = cmath.rect(i, i_rad)
    return v_rect * i_rect

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"Power: {get_apparent_power(100, 5, 0, 0)}")
